stackRefinements.core: Node ESM library with zod schema validation; tested via node --test
stackRefinements.web: React 18 frontend built with Vite; consumes @edge/core via file: link
stackRefinements.test-kit: Shared test utilities built on vitest; consumed dev-only by svc

notes: core is the central provider, consumed by both svc (workspace:*) and web (file:../core) — protocol differs but both are internal edges; core changes first when tasks span layers.
test-kit is a provider consumed only as a devDependency of svc (test utils); dev-only mark is informational — deriveDispatchOrder weighs it like any other edge, so test-kit still orders before svc.
svc and web are leaf consumers no other layer depends on; they change last.
No layer consumes legacy and legacy declares nothing (no manifest) — an island, but its true position is unknowable until its manifest gap is resolved.

gaps.issue: No package.json at packages/legacy/ (only src/index.js) — dependencies unknowable from manifests; layer cannot be placed in the dependency graph and must not be silently skipped.
